name: Dinner Dilema Fish and Fries
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Cajun seasoning mix, to taste
4 cups frozen seasoned spiral-cut french fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the oven into thirds by positioning racks accordingly. Preheat to 475 degrees.
2. Line two jelly-roll pans with foil for easy clean-up.
3. Brush both sides of the fish with oil and arrange in one of the prepared pans, sprinkling tops with Cajun seasoning.
4. Spread the seasoned fries in the other pan.
5. Bake the salmon on the upper oven rack and the french fries on the lower rack for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the fries are crispy.
